summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Docnode MVP. 33/33 backend pytest cases pass after fixing one MongoDB datetime tz bug in /api/auth/reset-password. Frontend login → dashboard → all 5 tabs (Início, Documentos, Vencimentos, Família, Ajustes) → 'Novo familiar' form all render and navigate correctly with proper testIDs and pt-BR copy.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 due to TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes (Mongo strips tz on read). Fixed by treating retrieved expires_at as UTC if naive.

issues: React Native Web warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, use 'boxShadow' (cosmetic console noise, not blocking).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: useNativeDriver not supported on web (expected on Expo web preview, not blocking).

action_items: Optional: replace shadow* style props with boxShadow to silence RN Web deprecation warnings.

Optional: align Expo SDK package versions per warning (expo-document-picker, expo-file-system, expo-image-picker, expo-secure-store, expo-sharing) to recommended ranges to avoid future incompatibilities.
critical_code_review_comments: Mongo datetime values are stored as tz-aware but returned naive; the reset-password code compared a naive datetime to tz-aware now_utc(). Same pattern could affect any future code reading datetime fields back from Mongo - consider a small helper to normalize.

CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False; cookie auth from a cross-origin web client won't work. Mobile app uses Bearer headers so OK for MVP, but note for future web deployment.
Login attempt lockout logic in server.py increments count and only sets locked_until on the 5th attempt - works, but resets locked_until to None on attempts 1-4 which is fine for current behavior.
/api/documentos list builds in-memory filter (status_filter + q against familiar_nome) after Mongo query - acceptable for MVP scale; document for future.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows tested (login, all 5 tabs, family form rendering)

seed_data_creation: Tests register ephemeral users prefixed TEST_; one test deletes its own account at the end to verify cascade. No persistent test data left aside from a few TEST_ users used during the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_docnode_api.py is the canonical regression suite. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_docnode_api.py -v`. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Admin creds admin@docnode.com/admin123 are seeded on startup. Frontend testIDs verified: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, dashboard-username, stat-*, dashboard-add-document, dashboard-add-family, famform-* on the family form. Form submit + document creation UI flow not exercised end-to-end via Playwright (only rendering verified) - main agent or next iteration can submit a familiar via UI to round out coverage.
rca_of_issue: Bug: POST /api/auth/reset-password 500. RCA: PyMongo/Motor returns datetime objects without tzinfo even when inserted with tz-aware values. Comparison `rec['expires_at'] < now_utc()` raised TypeError. Fix applied in server.py lines ~430-438: normalize expires_at to UTC if naive before comparing. Verified by re-running TestAuth.test_forgot_and_reset_password (now passing).
